# shell

App shell for the Home launcher. Registers the `/home` app entry and defines the
`Home.Section` slot that sub-plugins contribute launcher sections to.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: App shell for Home. Registers the /home app entry and defines the Home.Section slot.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Apps.App` "Home" → `HomeLayout`
  - Uses: `apps.Apps`
  - Exports: Values: `Home`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
